q.en: What did Cathy Freeman win at the 2000 Olympic Games in Sydney?
q.zh: 凯西·弗里曼在2000年悉尼奥运会上赢得了什么？

options.en: A bronze in gymnastics according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 体操铜牌（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Introduction says she won 'the gold in the 400-meter dash at the 2000 Olympic Games in Sydney.'
explain.zh: 引言说她在“2000年悉尼奥运会的400米跑中夺得金牌”。

options.en: The first, original people of Australia
options.zh: 澳大利亚最早、最原始的原住民族

options.en: European settlers who arrived in 1780 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1780年到达的欧洲移民（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says the Aborigines 'are the first people who lived in Australia, before Europeans settled there.'
explain.zh: 书中说原住民是“欧洲人定居之前，最早生活在澳大利亚的人”。

q.en: What 'first' did Cathy achieve as an Aborigine?
q.zh: 作为原住民，凯西取得了什么“第一”？

options.en: First to sail around Australia according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 第一个环游澳大利亚的人（按书中另一种说法）
第一个登上乌卢鲁的人

options.en: First Aborigine to win such a high Olympic honor
options.zh: 第一个获得如此高奥运荣誉的原住民

explain.en: The book calls her 'the first Aborigine to capture such a high honor.'
explain.zh: 书中称她为“第一个获得如此崇高荣誉的原住民”。

q.en: In what year did Captain James Cook claim Australia for Great Britain?
q.zh: 詹姆斯·库克船长在哪一年为英国宣布占领澳大利亚？

options.en: 1967 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book states 'English explorers under Captain James Cook claimed Australia as a colony for Great Britain in 1780.'
explain.zh: 书中说“库克船长率领的英国探险家于1780年为英国把澳大利亚变为殖民地”。

q.en: What change did the 1967 law bring for Aborigines?
q.zh: 1967年的法律给原住民带来了什么改变？

options.en: They were allowed to become citizens, vote, and receive benefits
options.zh: 他们被允许成为公民、投票并享受福利

options.en: They lost the right to speak their languages according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们失去了说本族语言的权利（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They were forced to leave their land

explain.en: The book says the 1967 law 'allowed Aborigines to become citizens' with the right to vote and government benefits.
explain.zh: 书中说1967年的法律“允许原住民成为公民”，拥有投票权和政府福利。

q.en: At which earlier Olympics did Cathy win a silver medal before her gold?
q.zh: 在夺得金牌之前，凯西在哪届奥运会上获得过银牌？

explain.en: The book says at the 1996 Atlanta Games she 'did win the silver' in the 400-meter dash.
explain.zh: 书中说在1996年亚特兰大奥运会上，她在400米跑中“赢得了银牌”。

q.en: Why did Cathy carry both the Australian and Aboriginal flags during victory laps?
q.zh: 为什么凯西在胜利绕场时同时举着澳大利亚国旗和原住民旗帜？

options.en: To show her national pride and represent both her country and her people
options.zh: 为了表达爱国之情，同时代表国家和本民族

options.en: To protest against the government according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 为了抗议政府（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The book says Cathy responded that she was 'merely showing her national pride' by carrying both flags.
explain.zh: 书中说凯西回应，她举两面旗只是“在表达她的民族自豪感”。

q.en: What happened to Cathy's father when she was five years old?
q.zh: 凯西五岁时，她的父亲发生了什么事？

options.en: He became a famous coach according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他成了著名教练（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He left the family after becoming sick with a drinking problem
options.zh: 他生病又有酗酒问题后离开了家

explain.en: The book says 'When Cathy was five years old, her father left the family after being very sick and developing a drinking problem.'
explain.zh: 书中说“凯西五岁时，父亲在重病并染上酗酒问题后离开了家”。

q.en: What honor did Cathy receive in 1997 after her World Championship win in Athens?
q.zh: 1997年雅典世锦赛夺冠后，凯西获得了什么荣誉？

options.zh: 澳大利亚青年年度人物

explain.en: The book says 'Soon after, she was named Australian of the Year' following the Athens victory.
explain.zh: 书中说雅典夺冠后“不久，她被评为澳大利亚年度人物”。

q.en: About how many Aborigines lived in Australia over 200 years ago?
q.zh: 两百多年前，澳大利亚大约生活着多少原住民？

options.en: Fewer than one hundred according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 不足一百（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Between one million and three million

explain.en: The book says there were 'between one million and three million Aborigines' when the English first settled.
explain.zh: 书中说英国殖民者初到时，原住民有“一百万到三百万”之多。

prompt.en: Cathy Freeman is described as a role model who helped bring Australians together. In your own words, what makes someone a good role model, and what qualities of Cathy's (from the book) show this?
prompt.zh: 书中把凯西·弗里曼描述成帮助澳大利亚人团结的榜样。用你自己的话说，什么样的人才是好榜样？书中凯西的哪些品质体现了这一点？

en: Name one quality Cathy showed (e.g., determination, pride in her people, kindness to family).
Explain how that quality makes her a role model.
zh: 说出凯西展现的一种品质（如毅力、对本民族的自豪、对家人的关爱）。
说明这种品质为何让她成为榜样。
